name: fusion360-mcp
description: Drive the Autodesk Fusion 360 MCP server reliably. Parametric constrained sketches, extrudes, holes, fillets, multi-body modeling, assemblies and components, as-built joints and motion (hinges, sliders), print-in-place mechanisms and print orientation, exports to STL/3MF/STEP, undo/redo, screenshots with explicit camera control, API lookup discipline, preview-API safety, plus a catalog of failure modes and fixes from real product design sessions.
